pages.text: $(italic)Create: Diesel Generators$() adds liquid-fuelled power. Refine $(bold)Plant Oil$() and crude fuels into diesel, then burn them in $(bold)generators$() that output enormous rotational force — far past what water and windmills give, without a steam boiler's bulk.$(br2)In Novus, $(bold)Plant Oil$() is one of the fluids you can $(l:2_processing/pressing)press$() from Mega tree seeds, tying the seed economy straight into power.
pages.title: Diesel Generators

pages.text: The chain is: grow or gather oil-bearing matter → squeeze/refine it into fuel → feed a generator. Bigger generators and better fuels climb the output ladder.$(br2)It pairs naturally with tree farms and the press, making fuel a renewable, automatable resource.
pages.title: The Fuel Chain
